title: Reading and Use of English – Part 3
description: For questions 17–24, read the text below. Use the word given in CAPITALS at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: The (0) TRADITIONAL (TRADITION) office environment has undergone a massive transformation in recent years. Advances in technology have made it (17) INCREASINGLY (INCREASE) easy for employees to work from home. This shift offers (18) FLEXIBILITY (FLEXIBLE) that was previously unavailable to many workers. Companies have noted that (19) PRODUCTIVITY (PRODUCE) often remains high, or even improves, outside the office. However, the (20) ABSENCE (ABSENT) of face-to-face interaction can lead to feelings of (21) ISOLATION (ISOLATE). To combat this, managers are (22) STRENGTHENING (STRONG) their use of virtual meetings to maintain team spirit. The (23) SUCCESSFUL (SUCCESS) implementation of remote work requires clear communication and trust. (24) CONSEQUENTLY (CONSEQUENT), many businesses are adopting hybrid models that combine the benefits of both home and office settings, ensuring that employees stay connected while enjoying a better work-life balance and the freedom to manage their own schedules more effectively in a rapidly changing professional landscape.

example.explanation: Adjective required to modify 'environment'; TRADITION → TRADITIONAL.

questions.explanation: Adverb required to modify the adjective 'easy'; INCREASE → INCREASINGLY.
Noun required as the subject of the clause; PRODUCE → PRODUCTIVITY.
Noun required after the definite article; ABSENT → ABSENCE.
Present participle for continuous tense; STRONG → STRENGTHENING.
Adjective required to modify 'implementation'; SUCCESS → SUCCESSFUL.
Adverb required at the start of the sentence; CONSEQUENT → CONSEQUENTLY.
